builders.title: Star the Davinci Node repo on GitHub
builders.description: Enjoying Davinci Node? Star the repository on GitHub to support the project and help more developers discover it.

callToAction.title: Star the Node repo
callToAction.help: Click to visit the Davinci Node GitHub repository

builders.title: Star the Davinci SDK repo on GitHub
builders.description: Want to build with Davinci? Explore our SDK, star the repository on GitHub, and start creating something great on the protocol.

callToAction.title: Star the SDK repo
callToAction.help: Click to visit the Davinci SDK GitHub repository

supporters.title: Join DAVINCI Telegram
supporters.description: The fastest channel for protocol updates, governance discussions, and community alpha. Join the group to stay in the loop.

callToAction.title: Join DAVINCI Telegram
callToAction.help: Click to join the DAVINCI Telegram

connectButton.title: Connect Telegram
connectButton.help: Connect your Telegram account to verify your membership in the DAVINCI Telegram group

supporters.title: Join DAVINCI Discord
supporters.description: Join the DAVINCI Discord server to connect with the community, stay up to date, and get support when you need it.

callToAction.title: Join DAVINCI Discord
callToAction.help: Click to join the DAVINCI Discord server

connectButton.title: Connect Discord
connectButton.help: Connect your Discord account to verify your membership in the DAVINCI Discord server

supporters.title: Complete DAVINCI Quest Profile
supporters.description: Create your identity on the DAVINCI Quests platform. Your profile tracks points, completed quests, and role progress. It's how the protocol knows you.

supporters.title: Cast First Vote
supporters.description: This is what DAVINCI was built for. Open any active voting process in AsktheWorld mini app, make your choice, and submit it onchain. Your first vote. Permanent and verifiable.

callToAction.title: Verify a vote
callToAction.help: Click analyse a process on the AskTheWorld to verify your votes

supporters.title: Verify Identity via Self
supporters.description: Privacy-preserving identity verification powered by Self. Prove you're human without giving up your data: the way onchain identity should work.

callToAction.title: Verify a vote
callToAction.help: Click analyse a process on the AskTheWorld to verify your votes

supporters.title: Cast 5 Votes
supporters.description: You've got the hang of it. Five votes across any processes. You're becoming a regular voice in onchain governance.

callToAction.title: Verify a vote
callToAction.help: Click analyse a process on the AskTheWorld to verify your votes

supporters.title: Cast 20 Votes
supporters.description: Twenty votes. You're not just using DAVINCI, you're proving that universal onchain voting has real, recurring demand. This matters.

callToAction.title: Verify a vote
callToAction.help: Click analyse a process on the AskTheWorld to verify your votes

supporters.title: Try New Mini App
supporters.description: Every mini app built on DAVINCI is a new use case for universal voting. Explore the latest one, interact with it, and earn points for being an early tester.

callToAction.title: Explore MiniApps
callToAction.help: Click to explore the new miniapp: AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Create 3 Processes on AskTheWorld mini app
supporters.description: You're not just voting anymore, you're organizing. Create three voting processes on DAVINCI and see what happens when you put decisions in other people's hands.

callToAction.title: Create a Process
callToAction.help: Click to create a process on the AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Create 10 Processes on AskTheWorld mini app
supporters.description: Ten processes live on DAVINCI: you're generating real governance activity. The protocol gets stronger with every process created.

callToAction.title: Create a Process
callToAction.help: Click to create a Process on the AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Create 20 Processes on AskTheWorld mini app
supporters.description: Twenty processes. You're one of the most active process creators on the protocol, and a core part of the reason DAVINCI exists. Top creator status.

callToAction.title: Create a Process
callToAction.help: Click to create a Process on the AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Get 15 Users to Vote in Your Process
supporters.description: Creating a process is one thing. Getting people to show up and vote is another. Drive real participation in your voting processes and earn points as turnout grows.

callToAction.title: Create a Process
callToAction.help: Click to create a Process on the AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Get 30 Users to Vote in Your Process
supporters.description: Creating a process is one thing. Getting people to show up and vote is another. Drive real participation in your voting processes and earn points as turnout grows.

callToAction.title: Create a Process
callToAction.help: Click to create a Process on the AskTheWorld

supporters.title: Complete Sprint Campaign
supporters.description: Finish every quest in the current sprint to unlock a bonus reward. This is for the people who show up, follow through, and don't leave points on the table.
